'''Leong''' was a member of the [[Infiltrators/Legends|Infiltrators]]. On assignment to [[Bevell Three]], the five-man team including Leong and [[Jai Raventhorn]] was ambushed by a squadron of [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE Bombers]] after [[Galactic Empire/Legends|the Empire]] was tipped-off to their presence.<ref name="Handoff" />

The Bombers razed the area and Leong sustained heavy injuries, dying en route back to the [[Hospital ship/Legends|medical frigate]].<ref name="Handoff" />
